mnemonics.title: Johnson Steps
mnemonics.content: JOHNSON: Justify weights via new node, Optimize with Dijkstra, Handle original weights, Normalize results, Solve all-pairs

mnemonics.title: A* Components
mnemonics.content: A-STAR: Actual cost + Smart heuristic Tracks All Routes

visualTips.visualization: Imagine pulling graph surface to make all edges positive while keeping path relationships
Two expanding circles meeting in the middle like tunnel boring machines

analogies.analogy: Major airports connecting continents - focus on big hubs for long routes
Adjusting rubber bands between nodes to find tautest/shortest connections
